summary: Tested Check-in and Evidence API endpoints. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: InvitationPage check-in section works for accepted participants, AppointmentDetail shows evidence dashboard and re-evaluate button works correctly.

issues: Check-in section not visible for 'accepted_pending_guarantee' status - participants must complete guarantee first. This may be intentional design but differs from requirement stating check-in for 'accepted participants'.

passed_tests: 1. GET /api/checkin/status/{appointment_id} - Returns check-in status with evidence (PASSED)
6. GET /api/checkin/qr/{appointment_id} - Generates QR code with base64 image and token (PASSED)
17. Evidence aggregation - 2+ signals produce strong evidence (PASSED)
24. UI: InvitationPage check-in section visible for accepted participant (PASSED)
25. UI: Check-in effectué indicator with timestamp (PASSED)
26. UI: Evidence indicators (Arrivée confirmée, QR validé, GPS enregistré) (PASSED)
27. UI: AppointmentDetail Check-ins & Preuves section visible (PASSED)
28. UI: Evidence shows 3 signals with timestamps and Preuve forte badge (PASSED)
29. UI: Détection de présence section with summary cards (PASSED)
30. UI: Re-évaluer button works and shows toast notification (PASSED)
critical_code_review_comments: Check-in section in InvitationPage only renders for 'accepted' and 'accepted_guaranteed' statuses, not 'accepted_pending_guarantee'. This is likely intentional (guarantee must be completed first) but should be confirmed against requirements.
seed_data_creation: Created new appointment b29f794f-094c-4652-9091-7a22d5f94cda with participant for future check-in testing. Existing participant 7b283114 has 3 evidence items (manual_checkin, qr, gps) with strong evidence aggregation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Check-in and evidence system fully tested. QR token format: NLYT:{appointment_id}:{epoch//60}:{hmac_16chars}. QR rotates every 60 seconds with 2-window tolerance. Evidence aggregation: 2+ signals = strong, 1 signal = medium, 0 = weak/none. Decision engine: strong evidence auto-classifies as on_time/late, no evidence = manual_review. Duplicate check-ins return 409. GPS uses haversine distance with 200m default radius. The existing participant 7b283114 has 3 evidence items and will return 409 for all check-in attempts. For fresh check-in testing, create new participants with 'accepted' status.

verified_features.manual_checkin: POST /api/checkin/manual with device_info and optional GPS
verified_features.qr_verification: POST /api/checkin/qr/verify validates token and creates evidence
verified_features.evidence_view: GET /api/checkin/evidence/{appointment_id} returns aggregated evidence per participant
verified_features.duplicate_handling: All check-in endpoints return 409 for duplicates
verified_features.decision_engine: strong evidence → on_time/late, no evidence → manual_review
verified_features.ui_invitation_checkin: 3 buttons (Je suis arrivé, Scanner QR, Afficher QR) for accepted participants
verified_features.ui_qr_display_modal: Shows QR image and token text with auto-refresh
verified_features.ui_reevaluate_button: Re-évaluer button triggers re-evaluation with toast notification

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints tested against real backend.
